title: indigofera rivularis
intro: Indigofera rivularis, also known as the East African wild indigo, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, alleviating fever, and treating various skin conditions. Indigofera rivularis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
